claim_boundaries: This matrix compares held-out alignment across multiple S2PC runtime candidates.
Only candidates with lower held-out loss than baseline count as improvements.
S2PC runtime effect is a held-out public-data alignment comparison; not field validation.
The baseline and S2PC runtime benchmarks use the same held-out HPS/HTOPS evaluation projection.
This artifact compares segment-level distributional alignment only; it does not establish causal policy effects.
Official public-use segment alignment smoke benchmark only; not field validation.
The official side is an observed distribution proxy derived from public-use HTOPS/HPS survey fields.
The prediction side must come from a separately auditable LLM cohort or product segment report.
This artifact does not establish causal policy effects or China policy forecast validity.
claim_boundary: S2PC runtime effect matrix ranks held-out alignment outcomes across candidate variants; not field validation.
